task_completion.description: Verify an Expense Claim is created for the correct employee.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An Expense Claim form or list view in ERPNext showing 'Marco Silva' selected as the Employee.

task_completion.description: Verify the Expense Claim contains the four specified line items with correct amounts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The expenses table within the Expense Claim shows four rows: Accommodation ($555.00), Airfare ($420.00), Ground Transportation ($95.00), and Meals and Entertainment ($180.00).

task_completion.description: Verify the total amount of the Expense Claim is correct.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Total Claimed Amount' or 'Grand Total' field on the Expense Claim shows exactly $1,250.00.

task_completion.description: Verify the Expense Claim has been submitted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Expense Claim document shows a status of 'Unpaid' or 'Submitted' (no longer 'Draft'), or the action button shows 'Cancel' instead of 'Submit'.

task_completion.description: Verify a Payment Entry is created to reimburse the employee.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Payment Entry form in ERPNext showing Party Type as 'Employee', Party as 'Marco Silva', and the Payment Amount as $1,250.00.

task_completion.description: Verify the Payment Entry has been submitted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Payment Entry document shows a 'Submitted' status (or a 'Cancel' button instead of 'Submit'), OR the original Expense Claim status has updated to 'Paid'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ERPNext web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the ERPNext web application open in a browser, not just terminal windows executing API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually filled out the forms step-by-step.
integrity.visual_evidence: A progression of screenshots showing data entry into the Expense Claim and Payment Entry forms, rather than just a final state appearing instantly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the application by directly modifying the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing direct MariaDB/MySQL queries or python scripts injecting data into the ERPNext database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Employee Name: Marco Silva. Expected Expense Claim Total: $1,250.00. Expected Line Items: 4 (Accommodation: $555, Airfare: $420, Ground Transportation: $95, Meals and Entertainment: $180).
